next_steps: Perform induced sputum for P. jirovecii fluorescent antibody staining and PCR
Obtain bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, microbiology, and fungal stains
Initiate empiric treatment for P. jirovecii pneumonia with high-dose trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole and systemic corticosteroids
Obtain blood cultures and fungal blood cultures
Consult infectious disease specialist for management of advanced HIV and potential opportunistic infections
Defer initiation of antiretroviral therapy to avoid potential IRIS until infectious workup is clearer
